ivpn.name: IVPN
use_cases: Best for those who need a granular DNS they can monitor and control
Best for those who want to completely block all Big Tech domians
pros: [Hardcore Mode](https://www.ivpn.net/blog/block-ads-and-beat-data-surveillance-with-ivpns-antitracker/) blocks all Google and Facebook domains
[Trusted/Untrusted networks](https://www.ivpn.net/blog/new-trusted-wi-fi-networks-feature-for-ivpn-apps/) feature allows the VPN to enable or disable automatically on certain networks
Offers [granular DNS](https://www.ivpn.net/en/services/) that lets you monitor and control connections (Plus plan)

mullvad.name: Mullvad
use_cases: Best for people on a budget who still want a full-featured VPN
Best for people who value maximum privacy
pros: Flat rate of $5/month for all services and payment lengths
Frequently engages in [early-adoption practices](https://mullvad.net/en/blog/2025/12/30/mullvad-review-of-2025) to improve user privacy and security.

protonvpn.name: Proton VPN
use_cases: Best for people who want an ecosystem
Best for people who use streaming services
Best for those who need port forwarding
pros: Offers a limited number of free servers
Advertises to work with streaming services such as Netflix and Disney+ (paid plans only)
Offers TOTP and hardware token [multifactor authentication](/guides/most-important/mfa) for accounts
